task_completion.description: Verify that the farmOS Field Kit app is open and a new 'Activity' log is being created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should show the farmOS Field Kit interface with an 'Activity' log form.

task_completion.description: Verify the log name and date are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name field should contain 'Subsoiling - Field 4' and the date field should be set to August 15, 2025 (or 2025-08-15).

task_completion.description: Verify the notes contain the specified agricultural details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The notes field should contain the text: 'Ran Yeomans Keyline Plow to alleviate plow pan compaction. 3 shanks on 30-inch centers. Soil conditions were dry enough for excellent shattering. No subsoil mixing observed. Followed keyline contour pattern.'

task_completion.description: Verify the first quantity (Area Treated) is added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A quantity entry should be visible with the value '4.5', unit 'acres' (or similar), and the label 'Area Treated'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second quantity (Working Depth) is added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A quantity entry should be visible with the value '16', unit 'inches' (or similar), and the label 'Working Depth'.

task_completion.description: Verify the log has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The log should appear in the list of saved logs, or a success message/check mark indicating the log was saved should be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the farmOS Field Kit application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the genuine farmOS Field Kit mobile app interface, not a web browser, text editor, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows or command-line interfaces used to inject data into the app's database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: farmOS Field Kit is the official mobile app for the farmOS farm management system. The task involves creating an 'Activity' log, which is a valid catch-all log type in farmOS. The notes contain verified agricultural terminology (Yeomans Keyline Plow, plow pan, shattering, shanks). The quantities should be 4.5 acres (Area Treated) and 16 inches (Working Depth). The date is August 15, 2025. Ensure the agent interacted with the actual farmOS Field Kit app interface.
